title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management B2B SaaS company with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue-analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR in globally distributed teams.
score_reason: Excellent alignment across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ year requirement, B2B SaaS fintech expertise directly matches Finout's domain, Head of RevOps role matches target title, and scaling experience aligns perfectly with 100+ employee company at growth stage. Tel Aviv/New York hybrid is ideal for Tel Aviv-based candidate.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's expansion and was impressed by your GTM infrastructure challenges at this scale—building the operational backbone for a cloud cost-management platform across distributed Tel Aviv and New York teams is exactly the kind of multi-region, high-complexity RevOps mandate you've scaled before. With your track record in fintech SaaS and deep Salesforce + revenue analytics expertise, you'd be positioned to accelerate their path beyond $30M ARR while bringing the kind of hands-on leadership their CRO clearly needs. I think there's a genuine conversation here worth having.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. You'll architect the territory framework, manage operating cadence, support cross-functional GTM initiatives, partner with Sales leadership, Strategy and Finance to optimize territory composition, and serve as a key partner providing dashboards and regional insights. Requires strong cross-functional collaboration, stakeholder management, and comfort navigating ambiguity in fast-paced environments. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Excellent match for a senior RevOps executive—territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, cross-functional GTM leadership, and data-driven operations are core competencies. Remote US role aligns perfectly with location flexibility, and Gong's sales intelligence platform is ideal for a RevOps leader focused on seller productivity optimization.
ai_opener: I've followed Gong's evolution as a market leader in revenue intelligence, and your Territory Strategy & Operations role immediately resonated—architecting scalable territory frameworks and driving seller productivity through data are exactly where I've spent the last 15 years in B2B SaaS. With deep experience in pipeline forecasting, GTM cross-functional leadership, and building the operational infrastructure that compounds revenue growth, I'm interested in exploring how I can help Gong accelerate territory optimization and close the gap between data insights and field execution.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: Warp seeks its first Revenue Operations Manager to work across Sales, Marketing, Growth, and Product, ensuring the funnel is predictable, efficient, and scalable. You'll inherit an existing RevOps stack and level it up. Requires 4–8+ years at B2B SaaS orgs, ideally with PLG motion and enterprise sales, hands-on ownership of a CRM and core funnel workflows (routing, lifecycle stages, pipeline hygiene, automation), the ability to diagnose funnel issues fast, and a high-agency, pragmatic mindset with strong cross-functional communication skills.
score_reason: Omri is a senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience, significantly exceeding the 4-8 year requirement. His expertise in CRM administration, pipeline forecasting, funnel optimization, and cross-functional GTM alignment directly matches Warp's need for a first RevOps hire to scale their funnel—this is an ideal growth-stage opportunity for his seniority level.
ai_opener:
Hi [Hiring Manager],

I came across Warp's Revenue Operations Manager opening and it immediately resonated—building a scalable RevOps function from the ground up for a fast-growing B2B SaaS company is exactly the type of high-impact work I thrive on. With 15+ years leading revenue operations and GTM strategy across multiple scaling phases, I've built and optimized funnel stacks, implemented predictable pipeline forecasting, and bridged Sales, Marketing, Growth, and Product to drive repeatable revenue. I'd love to explore how I can help Warp move from good funnel hygiene to predictable, enterprise-grade RevOps infrastructure.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: VulnCheck seeks a Revenue Operations Manager with 4+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Systems within B2B SaaS. Requires hands-on Salesforce administration (object design, workflow automation, validation rules, reporting, data governance) or HubSpot expertise (lifecycle stages, lead scoring, automation, marketing-to-sales handoff). You'll build executive-level dashboards covering pipeline health, conversion, forecasting, bookings, and churn/expansion, with strong knowledge of SaaS metrics (ARR, ACV, sales velocity, NRR) and experience integrating a broader GTM tech stack including enrichment, sales engagement, and BI tools.

Remote US role aligns perfectly with his location flexibility, and the focus on executive dashboards and GTM tech stack integration plays to his senior-level strengths.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I noticed VulnCheck is building out Revenue Operations and saw the Manager role. With 15+ years scaling GTM operations across B2B SaaS—including hands-on Salesforce and HubSpot architecture, executive dashboard design, and pipeline/forecasting automation—I've built the exact systems you're describing (ARR tracking, conversion analytics, tech stack integration). Given VulnCheck's growth trajectory, I'd be interested in discussing how I could accelerate your go-to-market infrastructure.

title: RevOps Manager

title: GTM / RevOps Engineer
description: Liatrio seeks a GTM/Revenue Operations Engineer who thinks like a builder, operating at the intersection of technology and revenue strategy. ai_opener: Omri—Liatrio's GTM/RevOps Engineer role caught my attention because you're solving a problem most RevOps leaders face: bridging the gap between revenue strategy and technical execution.
